plot_specs.title: Sales Trend Over Time
plot_specs.rationale: Shows the overall business trajectory across the year.

plot_specs.title: Regional Sales by Month
plot_specs.rationale: Compares contribution and momentum across regions.

plot_specs.title: Sales by Category
plot_specs.rationale: Highlights which categories contribute the most revenue.

plot_specs.title: Marketing Spend vs Sales
plot_specs.rationale: Tests whether higher marketing spend is associated with higher sales.

plot_specs.title: Top Products by Sales
plot_specs.rationale: Shows the best-performing products to support product strategy.

slides.title: Presentation Goal
slides.purpose: Set the context for the deck.

slides.title: Overall Sales Trend
slides.purpose: Summarize the business trajectory over time.
bullets: Overall sales changed by -5.3% from the first visible month to the last visible month.
The dataset contains 3 numeric metrics that can support performance analysis.

slides.title: Regional Performance
bullets: Regional comparison helps identify where future investment may have the largest impact.

slides.title: Category Mix
slides.purpose: Explain which categories drive the business.
bullets: Category concentration can guide inventory and campaign planning.

slides.title: Marketing Effectiveness
slides.purpose: Evaluate the relationship between spending and results.
bullets: Scatter analysis helps reveal whether higher spend aligns with higher sales.
A stronger upward pattern suggests marketing is contributing to revenue growth.

slides.title: Key Takeaways
bullets: Protect momentum in Asia while improving weaker regions.
Double down on Electronics while testing cross-sell opportunities.
Use chart-backed findings to decide next-quarter allocation.
